description: ETE3 tree statistics: taxa count, total/mean/max branch length (Newick tree -> JSON).
rules: read-only; writes one artifact (tree_stats.json) under record_store
applies midpoint rooting before computing statistics
requires the ete3 Python package; without it the core returns {} and the porter emits {}
usage: Set TREE_FILE (a Newick tree). Output: tree_stats.json with n_taxa, total_branch_length, mean_branch_length, max_branch_length.
limitation: Needs ete3 installed (pip install ete3). Offline / without ete3 the stats are not computed; the output is a graceful {} placeholder.
